properties.body:
EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
MAURITANIA.
DNC 01.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS UNTIL 20 JUN BY
   M/V POLARCUS ADIRA TOWING TEN 11000 METER
   CABLES IN AREA BETWEEN
   16-51N 16-02N AND 017-58W 019-25W
   EIGHT MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1276/19.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 21 JUN 19.
